name: sqlbroker
description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code. Cross-platform: Task Scheduler / systemd / launchd. Three auth modes: SQL / Windows Auth / Azure AD SPN. v2.6 adds 4 more MCP tools — get_server_info (version detection), find_in_definitions (full-text grep over proc/view bodies), preview_table (safe SELECT TOP n), get_active_queries (running queries). 11 MCP tools total + connection pool.
